runtime.json: 5:Champions created in one time period could produce different results when tested later if `runtime.json` changed between creation and testing.
21:**Root Cause:** Champion files only stored trial parameter overrides (`cfg`), not the complete merged configuration. Testing required merging with whatever `runtime.json` existed at test time.
